title: Date range filtering not exposed in MCP tool
evidence: src/mcp.rs:531-546 — search_matches tool definition has team/opponent/competition/season/limit but no from_date/to_date params. The underlying queries::MatchFilter (src/queries.rs:11-18) supports from/to NaiveDate fields, but tool_search_matches (src/mcp.rs:197-243) never reads them from args.
suggestion: Add from_date and to_date string parameters to the search_matches MCP tool definition and parse them in tool_search_matches

title: Extra tools beyond spec: brazilian_clubs_summary and team_competitions
evidence: src/mcp.rs:486-528 — two additional MCP tools not required by TASK.md provide useful functionality (Brazilian club player summaries, team competition listing)
